label: About
title: About White Garden Index
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 91 recent saved-signal files and 73 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @jonaasw1: cool internet things pt. 9 - digital MoMA gallery - personal "digital home" and link to agency site, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became White Garden Index: A quiet digital gallery field, scanned archive object, overhead scan: vast off-white paper-canvas with huge gutters, one hero-scale black rectangular aperture slightly off center holding a small dim image inset, and one large pale map-scrap drifting opposite. Smaller source-bearing thumbnails, mosaic chips, pinholes... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central black aperture with inset glow, left blue map wash field, and top-left teal triangular aperture.

typography.body_family: 'DFE Newsreader', Iowan Old Style, Georgia, serif
typography.rationale: Fraunces gives the title an organic, seed-label quality; Newsreader keeps the explanation calm and readable.
